members.name: FillFrom
members.summary: The initial offset used to fill the texture specified in UV coordinates.

members.name: FillTo
members.summary: The final offset used to fill the texture specified in UV coordinates.

members.name: Gradient
members.summary: The [Gradient] used to fill the texture.

members.name: Height
members.summary: The number of vertical color samples that will be obtained from the [Gradient], which also represents the texture's height.

members.name: UseHdr
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the generated texture will support high dynamic range ([constant Image.FORMAT_RGBAF] format). This allows for glow effects to work if [member Environment.glow_enabled] is [code]true[/code]. If [code]false[/code], the generated texture will use low dynamic range; overbright colors will be clamped ([constant Image.FORMAT_RGBA8] format).

members.name: Width
members.summary: The number of horizontal color samples that will be obtained from the [Gradient], which also represents the texture's width.

values.name: FILL_CONIC
values.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a cone pattern.

values.name: FILL_LINEAR
values.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a straight line.

values.name: FILL_RADIAL
values.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a circular pattern.

values.name: FILL_SQUARE
values.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a square pattern.

values.name: REPEAT
values.summary: The texture is filled starting from [member fill_from] to [member fill_to] offsets, repeating the same pattern in both directions.

values.name: REPEAT_MIRROR
values.summary: The texture is filled starting from [member fill_from] to [member fill_to] offsets, mirroring the pattern in both directions.

values.name: REPEAT_NONE
values.summary: The gradient fill is restricted to the range defined by [member fill_from] to [member fill_to] offsets.

constants.name: FILL_LINEAR
constants.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a straight line.

constants.name: FILL_RADIAL
constants.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a circular pattern.

constants.name: FILL_SQUARE
constants.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a square pattern.

constants.name: FILL_CONIC
constants.summary: The colors are linearly interpolated in a cone pattern.

constants.name: REPEAT_NONE
constants.summary: The gradient fill is restricted to the range defined by [member fill_from] to [member fill_to] offsets.

constants.name: REPEAT
constants.summary: The texture is filled starting from [member fill_from] to [member fill_to] offsets, repeating the same pattern in both directions.

constants.name: REPEAT_MIRROR
constants.summary: The texture is filled starting from [member fill_from] to [member fill_to] offsets, mirroring the pattern in both directions.
